title: Slovakian Pepper Stew
description: A hearty, comforting Slovakian stew made with tender beef and a blend of spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the onions and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the curry powder and stir to combine.
Add the stew and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 hour.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
